name: nextjs-app-router
description: Codex skills for designing, building, and auditing Next.js App Router projects.

interface.shortDescription: Build and audit Next.js App Router projects.
interface.longDescription: A collection of Codex skills for Next.js App Router development. The current layered architecture skill separates product code into presentation, application, and infrastructure while keeping src/app as a thin framework boundary and src/shared as a neutral supporting area.
defaultPrompt: Structure this Next.js App Router project.
Audit this project's Next.js layer boundaries.
Move this App Router feature into the correct layers.
